ogtitle: Graduate careers in People and Culture (HR)
content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat     About us     Careers at NAB     Graduate jobs and early careers     Graduate careers at NAB     Graduate careers in People and Culture (HR)   Graduate careers in People and Culture (HR)   Help to shape a workplace and culture which inspires people to be the best they can be.    Apply now , opens in new window   About the People and Culture team   The ​People & Culture team supports NAB by developing and managing our people activities and services, helping to shape a workplace and culture which inspires our colleagues to be the best they can be.    We are enablers to NAB’s strategic ambition and custodians of our colleague experience. We focus on making our HR services simple, safe and fast for our colleagues to do their jobs and serve customers well. We provide great data and insights to help our leaders make sustainable workforce decisions.    Our people and culture graduate roles are based in Melbourne.    What we look for in a People and Culture graduate   We’re looking for commercially savvy graduates who are inclusive, compassionate and seek to drive positive outcomes for others. Graduates who are curious to find world class examples and leverage the power of data for creating colleague and customer value. We want graduates with numerical capabilities who can help us transform to be a strategic and data led HR function.    In addition to a passion for people you’ll also need to have a degree/major in the following fields:     Business/Commerce  Human Resources  Law  Management  Psychology  Social Science  Project Management     What you’ll do in People and Culture    Work on major People and Culture projects  Contribute to research, strategy and initiatives across the People and Culture portfolio  Use your analytical capabilities to help leaders make People and Culture data-driven decisions  Support colleagues with People and Culture policies and processes  Simplify and standardise People and Culture policies and processes    Where People and Culture can take you   Our graduate program is designed to lead to a career in People and Culture. Our graduates successfully transition into an Analyst or Associate role within one of our many teams, providing diverse opportunities to specialise.    Meet Emma   "The NAB Graduate Program accelerated my career development through different rotations and experiences. It’s a supportive program tailored to your skillset, whilst also plunging you into the deep end to challenge yourself. As a graduate, the skills you can apply to the business are priceless – the rest of the business really values your unique and fresh perspective.”    Emma, NAB People & Culture Graduate    Other graduate careers to consider   Graduate careers in Finance and Strategy   Do you want to combine your interest in accounting and technology to help drive strategic business decisions?    Graduate careers in Enterprise Data and Analytics   Are you interested in advanced analytics, machine learning, artificial intelligence and big data?    Graduate careers in Business Banking   Are you passionate about delivering exceptional customer experiences and building a career in business banking?
